parameters.query:
WITH inp AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS d),
p AS (SELECT d->>'action' AS action, d->>'telefono' AS telefono, d->>'nombre' AS nombre, d->>'nuevo_telefono' AS nuevo_telefono, COALESCE((d->>'clases')::int, 0) AS clases FROM inp),
-- create_lead
lead_ins AS (
  INSERT INTO bejauha.leads (telefono, nombre, origen, clasificacion)
  SELECT p.telefono, p.nombre, 'inbound', 'tibio' FROM p WHERE p.action = 'create_lead'
  ON CONFLICT (telefono) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING telefono, nombre
),
-- edit_nombre: actualiza solo el nombre del lead
edit_nombre_upd AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.leads l SET nombre = p.nombre, ultimo_contacto = now()
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'edit_nombre' AND l.telefono = p.telefono
  RETURNING l.telefono, l.nombre
),
-- edit_telefono: actualiza el tel; el ON UPDATE CASCADE de las FKs propaga a saldos/asistencias/recargas/handoffs.
-- Guard común: el nuevo_telefono NO debe colisionar con otro lead, y el original SÍ debe existir. Si falla, nada se actualiza.
edit_tel_chk AS (
  SELECT
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM bejauha.leads l WHERE l.telefono = (SELECT telefono FROM p)) AS old_existe,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM bejauha.leads l WHERE l.telefono = (SELECT nuevo_telefono FROM p)) AS new_existe
  WHERE (SELECT action FROM p) = 'edit_telefono'
),
edit_tel_logs AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.mensajes_logs ml SET telefono = p.nuevo_telefono
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'edit_telefono' AND ml.telefono = p.telefono
    AND (SELECT old_existe FROM edit_tel_chk) AND NOT (SELECT new_existe FROM edit_tel_chk)
  RETURNING ml.id
),
edit_tel_recv AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.mensajes_recibidos mr SET telefono = p.nuevo_telefono
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'edit_telefono' AND mr.telefono = p.telefono
    AND (SELECT old_existe FROM edit_tel_chk) AND NOT (SELECT new_existe FROM edit_tel_chk)
  RETURNING mr.message_id
),
edit_tel_upd AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.leads l SET telefono = p.nuevo_telefono, ultimo_contacto = now()
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'edit_telefono' AND l.telefono = p.telefono
    AND (SELECT old_existe FROM edit_tel_chk) AND NOT (SELECT new_existe FROM edit_tel_chk)
  RETURNING l.telefono, l.nombre
),
-- ajustar_saldo (set absoluto del saldo presencial)
saldo_prev_ajuste AS (
  SELECT s.clases_restantes AS prev, s.vence_at FROM bejauha.saldos_clases s, p
  WHERE p.action = 'ajustar_saldo' AND s.telefono = p.telefono AND s.tipo = 'presencial'
),
saldo_upd AS (
  INSERT INTO bejauha.saldos_clases (telefono, tipo, clases_restantes, vence_at)
  SELECT p.telefono, 'presencial', p.clases,
         COALESCE((SELECT vence_at FROM saldo_prev_ajuste),
                  (current_date + INTERVAL '3 months')::date)
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'ajustar_saldo'
  ON CONFLICT (telefono, tipo) DO UPDATE
    SET clases_restantes = EXCLUDED.clases_restantes, actualizado_at = now()
  RETURNING telefono, clases_restantes, vence_at
),
-- asistencia (-1 saldo, sin_saldo si ya estaba en 0)
saldo_prev_asis AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(s.clases_restantes, 0) AS prev FROM p
  LEFT JOIN bejauha.saldos_clases s ON s.telefono = p.telefono AND s.tipo = 'presencial'
  WHERE p.action = 'asistencia'
),
asis_log AS (
  INSERT INTO bejauha.asistencias (telefono, tipo, admin, sin_saldo)
  SELECT p.telefono, 'presencial', 'dashboard',
         COALESCE((SELECT prev FROM saldo_prev_asis), 0) <= 0
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'asistencia'
  RETURNING telefono
),
asis_upd AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.saldos_clases s
  SET clases_restantes = s.clases_restantes - 1, actualizado_at = now()
  FROM p WHERE p.action = 'asistencia' AND s.telefono = p.telefono AND s.tipo = 'presencial' AND s.clases_restantes > 0
  RETURNING s.clases_restantes
),
audit_log AS (
  INSERT INTO bejauha.mensajes_logs (telefono, direccion, agente, texto, intent, metadata)
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(p.nuevo_telefono,''), p.telefono), 'out', 'sistema',
         'dashboard:' || p.action || ' tel=' || p.telefono ||
           CASE WHEN p.action = 'ajustar_saldo' THEN ' clases=' || p.clases::text
                WHEN p.action = 'create_lead' THEN ' nombre=' || COALESCE(p.nombre,'')
                WHEN p.action = 'edit_nombre' THEN ' nombre_nuevo=' || COALESCE(p.nombre,'')
                WHEN p.action = 'edit_telefono' THEN ' nuevo_tel=' || COALESCE(p.nuevo_telefono,'')
                ELSE '' END,
         'dashboard_' || p.action,
         jsonb_build_object('source','dashboard','action',p.action,'telefono',p.telefono,'nombre',p.nombre,'clases',p.clases,'nuevo_telefono',p.nuevo_telefono)
  FROM p
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT action FROM p) AS action,
  (SELECT telefono FROM p) AS telefono,
  (SELECT nombre FROM p) AS nombre_input,
  (SELECT l.nombre FROM bejauha.leads l WHERE l.telefono = (SELECT telefono FROM p)) AS nombre_real,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bejauha.leads WHERE telefono = (SELECT telefono FROM p)) AS lead_existe,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_ins) AS lead_creado,
  (SELECT clases_restantes FROM saldo_upd LIMIT 1)::int AS saldo_nuevo,
  (SELECT to_char(vence_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM saldo_upd LIMIT 1) AS vence_at_nuevo,
  COALESCE((SELECT prev FROM saldo_prev_asis), 0)::int AS saldo_antes_asistencia,
  (SELECT clases_restantes FROM asis_upd LIMIT 1)::int AS saldo_despues_asistencia,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM asis_log) AS asistencia_registrada,
  (COALESCE((SELECT prev FROM saldo_prev_asis), 0) <= 0) AS era_deudor,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM edit_nombre_upd) AS edit_nombre_aplicado,
  (SELECT nombre FROM edit_nombre_upd LIMIT 1) AS edit_nombre_nuevo_nombre,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM edit_tel_upd) AS edit_tel_aplicado,
  COALESCE((SELECT old_existe FROM edit_tel_chk), false) AS edit_tel_old_existe,
  COALESCE((SELECT new_existe FROM edit_tel_chk), false) AS edit_tel_new_existe;
